title: Select Email From a Mirror Column in Send Email Automation
excerpt:

posts.author: Austin1 (Austin)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

I have a board called “Members” which listed contact information for all members. I then have a separate board related to tickets that may be opened by those members and mirror their email addresses (and other contact information) to that board. Why can I not select that mirrored email address in the automation for sending an email in that board?

This is such a basic feature and Monday.com is way overpriced if they cannot implement such basic usage of the system. Does anyone know any currently working solutions for this?

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml:
I don’t know if it’s on the roadmap, but you can check here? Feature requests - monday Community Forum

A workaround I do - when I set the automation/workflow to create the new item/link together, I have it pull the email address to an email column (not as a mirror column) so that I can use it.

Desiree - www.thecleverclovers.com

posts.author: noam.lapidot (Noam Lapidot)
posts.cookedHtml:
@Austin1 if you are open to use a marketplace app, SuperMail supports sending automated email to mirrored columns. In addition also allow to design nicer emails with rich text.

SuperMail – Email Automation - monday.com Marketplace SuperMail – Email Automation - monday.com Marketplace
